name: War
summary: Followers of war and battle deities. Bless your allies' weapons; lead the charge.

granted_power_l1.name: Battle Rage
granted_power_l1.summary: Standard action, melee touch on an ally; +1/2 caster level (min 1) on weapon damage rolls until the end of their next turn. Usable 3 + Wis modifier times per day.

higher_level_powers.summary: Free Combat feats from the War domain list.
